name: GAXOS.AI INC.
business: Gaxos.AI sells AI-powered solutions across defense, health, wellness, entertainment, and productivity. Its portfolio includes generative AI tools for game developers, AI image/video creation, AI health optimization, and AI-enhanced games. Customers include game developers, publishers, gamers, and health-conscious consumers.

exposures.sentence: Gaxos.AI is a technology company focused on reshaping the way people interact with artificial intelligence across everyday life and high-impact industries.
Gaxos Health will integrate AI-driven insights with individual biometric data and health goals to create web and application based personalized wellness strategies for users.

Gaxos Gaming (the Platform), created with a vision to develop, design, acquire, and manage conventional games and to combine these games with unconventional game mechanisms, such as the ability for gamers and developers to utilize artificial intelligence to create and design in-game features, as well as to mint unique in-game features, such as skins, characters, weapons, gear, levels, and virtual lands, in the form of non-fungible tokens, or NFTs, that will allow users to have unique experiences and more control over in-game assets.

On March 2, 2026, the Company entered into a Membership Interest Purchase Agreement with America First Defense.AI LLC, a New Mexico limited liability company ( AFD ), pursuant to which the Company agreed to purchase, and AFD agreed to sell, 19.99% of AFD s outstanding membership interests (the Membership Interests ) for an aggregate purchase price of $2,900,000.

Security breaches and attacks against our systems and network, and any potentially resulting breach or failure to otherwise protect confidential and proprietary information, could damage our reputation and negatively impact our business, as well as materially and adversely affect our financial condition and results of operations.

catalysts.event: Launch of Gaxos Labs generative AI service
catalysts.sentence: In September 2024, we launched a transformative generative AI service that empowers game developers and publishers.
In May 2025, we launched UnGPT.ai, a new tool designed to enhance text generated by artificial intelligence, making it sound more natural and human-like.
In August 2025, we launched Art-Gen.AI, an AI image and video creation platform that makes pro-grade content effortless for anyone, anywhere.

In December 2025, we launched Bible Pray AI, a personalized, AI-powered spiritual growth platform designed to help users deepen faith, strengthen daily devotion, and apply scripture for greater peace, clarity, and purpose.

On September 23, 2024, we formed a wholly-owned subsidiary, RNK Health LLC ( RNK Health ), to form a partnership and relationship with Nekwellness, LLC ( Nekwellness ) to engage in the business of marketing certain health-related products.

catalysts.event: Acquisition of 19.99% stake in America First Defense.AI
catalysts.sentence: The closing of the purchase occurred on March 5, 2026, subject to satisfaction of the conditions set forth in the Purchase Agreement.

catalysts.event: Launch of AI-powered health optimization product
catalysts.sentence: We launched the AI-powered health optimization product in the third quarter of 2024.
